title: Set default max open files in spec

comments.body:
LGTM assuming happy tests.
Do we need to note this default value somewhere in the documentation?
Test failures are with rootless. I'll disable this if rootless is set.
:+1: thanks, it fixed my bug again.

For some reason it looks like my comment is being covered up.
You shold also set the RLIMIT_NOPROC to the same number
Here is the patch I did for buildah.
projectatomic/buildah@a2b0184
Added `nproc` as well, and did some reformatting to clean up the function. Should be ready now

:pushpin: Commit 00de4e7 has been approved by `rhatdan`
